attributes.content:
## Overview

The Employee Profile card gives the workspace a structured home for internal employee record: role, department, manager, start date, skills, contact info.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Employee Profile acts as a canonical operational record. It keeps important facts, state changes, timestamps, and linked parties in one place so downstream workflows, approvals, and reporting can all rely on the same source of truth.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Contact]]** -- Employee Profile often needs a person-level reference for ownership, communication, or accountability.
- **[[Organization]]** -- Employee Profile frequently sits inside an account, company, or team-level relationship context.
- **[[Task]]** -- Employee Profile often creates follow-up work or is itself tracked through task execution.
- **[[Workflow Playbook]]** -- Employee Profile can be created, reviewed, or progressed as one step inside a repeatable workflow.
- **[[Document]]** -- Employee Profile can link to longer-form supporting content when a lightweight card needs deeper context.
- **[[Interview Feedback]]** -- Interview Feedback can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Employee Profile.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Employee Profile as the structured home for internal employee record: role, department, manager, start date, skills, contact info and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Employee Profile when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Employee Profile stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.
